action_list._raw:
click | add_data | 
    _list_id: post_semi_summary_list, 
    culture: @field.active_culture_name,
    sup_sarclage: @field.sup_sarclage,
    cost_sarclage: @field.cost_sarclage,
    sup_desherbage: @field.sup_desherbage,
    cost_desherbage: @field.cost_desherbage,
    sup_buttage: @field.sup_buttage,
    cost_buttage: @field.cost_buttage,
    q_npk: @field.q_npk,
    c_npk: @field.c_npk,
    q_uree: @field.q_ur,
    c_uree: @field.c_ur,
    q_herb: @field.q_herb,
    c_herb: @field.c_herb,
    q_ins: @field.q_ins,
    c_ins: @field.c_ins,
    obs_type: @field.obs_type,
    total_investi: @local.v_tot_cult
